issue_as_per_person: Device not reporting location since morning
issue_found_in_device: Loose antenna connector; intermittent GPS fix
remarks: Antenna re-seated temporarily; recommended replacement of connector and full test

issue_found_in_device: Firmware in older version causing frequent wake-ups
remarks: Updated firmware v1.2.3; battery consumption within expected range after update
SIM unlocked and reinserted; device regained network but needs close monitoring for 24h
